description: Letter in Hebrew by a bibliophile from Byzantium, whose family name is Pinhasi, to a scribe in a provincial town in Egypt, named Perahya (probably the same Perahya, who lived in the middle of the 12th century), asking him to send him the diwan (collection of poems) of the Spanish Hebrew poet, Ibn Gabirol. (Information from Mediterranean Society, II, pp. 238, 574)
